page_title: P Godzilla vs. Evangelion ~G Cell Awakening~
text:
is a pachinko machine developed by Bisty, it was announced on 17 October 2022 https://twitter.com/Fields_Fan/status/1581812235294236672 . This machine has an original story of a crossover between Rebuild of Evangelion and Godzilla https://www.eva-info.jp/17955 . The theme songs are "Teardrops of hope" by Yoko Takahashi http://king-cr.jp/artist/takahashi/information/#info221017 and Shuuketsu no Hate ni, "Shuuketsu no Toki ~Territory~" by Megumi Hayashibara https://news.yahoo.co.jp/articles/735d73dbd4e94015aa11ece29e6b06f405316bd4 .

History

After sleeping for a long time, Godzilla suddenly resumed its activities and landed in Japan.

At the same time, King Ghidorah also invaded Japan. Is there a red core that is characteristic of an Angel in the chest? Is King Ghidorah an Angel?

Rei Ayanami, whose heart was eroded by King Ghidorah's aura, became Ghidorah Rei and turned her against humanity. In order to rescue such Rei, Asuka and Unit-02 stand in front of Ghidorah Rei.
